creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Fri, Mar 23, 2007 at 08:40:18AM +0000, Pav Lucistnik wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/110693; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Pav Lucistnik <pav@FreeBSD.org>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, ota@j.email.ne.jp
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/110693: Port does not rebuild newer version if work dir
> 	of old versions are not removed
> Date: Fri, 23 Mar 2007 09:33:40 +0100
> 
>  I'm not sure this solves the problem. When portrevision increases, but
>  ${WRKSRC} does not change, the second build will still hit the files
>  left from the first one, no?
>  
>  You should really clean up after every build.

Yeah, I am not sure this can be considered a bug, it's just how the
ports collection is intended to work.  Running 'make clean' is part of
the required steps.

Kris
